mapper.insert: INSERT INTO REFRESH_TOKEN ( TOKEN_ID, USER_ID, TOKEN, EXPIRY_DT, REG_DT, LAST_USED_DT, REVOKED_YN ) VALUES ( #{tokenId}, #{userOid}, #{token}, #{expiryDt}, NOW(), NOW(), 'N' )
mapper.select: SELECT TOKEN_ID as tokenId, USER_ID as userId, TOKEN as token, EXPIRY_DT as expiryDt, REG_DT as regDt, LAST_USED_DT as lastUsedDt, REVOKED_YN as revokedYn, REVOKED_DT as revokedDt FROM REFRESH_TOKEN WHERE TOKEN_ID = #{tokenId} AND REVOKED_YN = 'N'

SELECT TOKEN_ID as tokenId, USER_ID as userId, TOKEN as token, EXPIRY_DT as expiryDt, REG_DT as regDt, LAST_USED_DT as lastUsedDt, REVOKED_YN as revokedYn, REVOKED_DT as revokedDt FROM REFRESH_TOKEN WHERE TOKEN = #{token} AND REVOKED_YN = 'N' AND EXPIRY_DT > NOW()
mapper.update: UPDATE REFRESH_TOKEN SET LAST_USED_DT = NOW() WHERE TOKEN_ID = #{tokenId}
UPDATE REFRESH_TOKEN SET REVOKED_YN = 'Y', REVOKED_DT = NOW() WHERE TOKEN_ID = #{tokenId}
UPDATE REFRESH_TOKEN SET REVOKED_YN = 'Y', REVOKED_DT = NOW() WHERE USER_ID = #{userOid} AND REVOKED_YN = 'N'
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM REFRESH_TOKEN WHERE EXPIRY_DT < NOW() OR (REVOKED_YN = 'Y' AND REVOKED_DT < DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 30 DAY))
